lines.english: Taking me by the arm, He saves me and carries me across the terrifying world-ocean. ||2||
I have sought the Sanctuary of the Perfect Guru. ||3||
God has rid me of my filth, and made me stainless and pure.
By His Grace, O Nanak, He saves us. ||4||4||17||
He Himself does, and causes everything to be done.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Basant, Fifth Mehl:
O my mind, remain conscious of the Lord. ||Pause||
Grasp hold of His Lotus Feet.
Renounce and abandon your egotism.
Behold the flowers flowering, and the blossoms blossoming forth!
Meet with God, O blessed one.
The tender young plants smell so good,
while others remain like dry wood.
it blossoms forth luxuriantly. ||1||
The season of spring has come;
Now, the Dark Age of Kali Yuga has come.
Do not wander lost in doubt and delusion.
It is not the season to plant other seeds.
Plant the Naam, the Name of the One Lord.
One who has such destiny written on his forehead,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਨ ਕਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥੨॥੧੮॥
lines.translit: gun kahe naanak har hare har hare |2|18|
lines.english: Nanak utters the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har. ||2||18||
Shall meet with the Guru and find the Lord.
O mortal, this is the season of the Naam.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Basant, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Hindol:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਇਕਤ੍ਰ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hoe ikatr milahu mere bhaaee dubidhaa door karahu liv laae |
lines.english: Come and join together, O my Siblings of Destiny; dispel your sense of duality and let yourselves be lovingly absorbed in the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਕੇ ਹੋਵਹੁ ਜੋੜੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੈਸਹੁ ਸਫਾ ਵਿਛਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har naamai ke hovahu jorree guramukh baisahu safaa vichhaae |1|
lines.english: Let yourselves be joined to the Name of the Lord; become Gurmukh, spread out your mat, and sit down. ||1||
In this way, throw the dice, O brothers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਅੰਤ ਕਾਲਿ ਨਹ ਲਾਗੈ ਪੀਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam japahu din raatee ant kaal neh laagai peer |1| rahaau |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, day and night. At the very last moment, you shall not have to suffer in pain. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਤੁਮੑ ਚਉਪੜਿ ਸਾਜਹੁ ਸਤੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਤੁਮੑ ਸਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam tuma chauparr saajahu sat karahu tuma saaree |
lines.english: Let righteous actions be your gameboard, and let the truth be your dice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਜੀਤਹੁ ਐਸੀ ਖੇਲ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohu jeetahu aisee khel har piaaree |2|
lines.english: Conquer sexual desire, anger, greed and worldly attachment; only such a game as this is dear to the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਠਿ ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਪਰਭਾਤੇ ਸੋਏ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: autth isanaan karahu parabhaate soe har aaraadhe |
lines.english: Rise in the early hours of the morning, and take your cleansing bath. Before you go to bed at night, remember to worship the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੜੇ ਦਾਉ ਲੰਘਾਵੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਸੇਤੀ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਤੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bikharre daau langhaavai meraa satigur sukh sehaj setee ghar jaate |3|
lines.english: My True Guru will assist you, even on your most difficult moves; you shall reach your true home in celestial peace and poise. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਖੇਲੈ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਖੈ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਰਚਨੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har aape khelai aape dekhai har aape rachan rachaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord Himself plays, and He Himself watches; the Lord Himself created the creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੋ ਨਰੁ ਖੇਲੈ ਸੋ ਜਿਣਿ ਬਾਜੀ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੯॥
lines.translit: jan naanak guramukh jo nar khelai so jin baajee ghar aaeaa |4|1|19|
lines.english: O servant Nanak, that person who plays this game as Gurmukh, wins the game of life, and returns to his true home. ||4||1||19||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਤੂਹੈ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਅਉਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: teree kudarat toohai jaaneh aaur na doojaa jaanai |
lines.english: You alone know Your Creative Power, O Lord; no one else knows it.
Basant, Fifth Mehl, Hindol:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਹਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਤੁਝੈ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis no kripaa kareh mere piaare soee tujhai pachhaanai |1|
lines.english: He alone realizes You, O my Beloved, unto whom You show Your Mercy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ਸਦਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰਾ ਰੰਗ ਤੇਰੇ ਆਪਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: thaan suhaavaa sadaa prabh teraa rang tere aapaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your place is eternally beautiful, God; Your wonders are infinite. ||1||Pause||
I am a sacrifice to Your devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਅਉਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ਕਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: teree sevaa tujh te hovai aaur na doojaa karataa |
lines.english: Only You Yourself can perform Your service. No one else can do it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਸੋਈ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਤੂ ਰੰਗੁ ਧਰਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhagat teraa soee tudh bhaavai jis no too rang dharataa |2|
lines.english: He alone is Your devotee, who is pleasing to You. You bless them with Your Love. ||2||
